name: Tarragon Chicken Salad Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Egg Bread, oval loaf unsliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Boned, skinned, and split the chicken breasts diagonally into 1/2 inch pieces.
2. In a 13 x 9 x 2-inch microwave-safe baking dish, arrange the chicken breasts with thicker portions toward the outside. Cover with plastic wrap; turn back one corner to vent. Cook on HIGH for 10 minutes, turning the chicken over after 5 minutes. Let cool in the dish.
3. In a medium glass bowl, combine asparagus and water. Cover; vent. Cook on HIGH for 3 minutes; drain. Rinse with cold water; drain. Set aside.
4. In a bowl, whisk together mayonnaise, lemon juice, crushed tarragon, salt, and pepper until blended. Stir in the drained asparagus, shredded carrot, chopped red pepper, and minced green onions. Cut the chicken into 1-inch pieces and stir into the mayonnaise mixture.
5. With a serrated knife, cut off a thin slice from the top of the bread, removing the inside (reserve for another use), leaving a 1/2-inch shell. Spoon the salad into the bread shell, mounding slightly. If desired, garnish with fresh tarragon. To serve, cut into wedges. Makes 8 to 10 servings.
